name: NioGold Mining Corp.
description: NioGold Mining Corp. was a Canadian-based junior mining company primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold resource properties. The company focused its operations within the prolific Val-d'Or and Malartic mining camps in Quebec, Canada. NioGold was dedicated to advancing its mineral projects through systematic exploration programs, aiming to identify and delineate significant gold deposits. The company was publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol NOX before being acquired by Osisko Mining Inc. in 2016, which integrated its assets into a larger regional portfolio.
